summary: Verified catalogues dropdown has 6 options in exact expected order (Table Grapes, Pomegranates, Bananas, Indian Mangoes, Writeups, Circulars). Ran full responsive audit across 5 routes x 3 viewports (1440x900, 768x1024, 375x812) — zero horizontal overflow, no broken images anywhere, correct nav behaviour (desktop/tablet show 5 links + logo with hamburger hidden; mobile hides links + shows hamburger). Mobile hamburger opens mobile menu with all 5 links (HOME, SERVICES, LICENSES, CATALOGUES, CONTACT). Mobile catalogue dropdown is full-width (327px in a 375px viewport = w-full minus px-6 padding) and selection of 'Writeups' works and shows preview.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 (5 routes x 3 viewports) responsive matrix cells report scrollWidth == innerWidth exactly (no overflow). Nav: hamburger visible only at 375, desktop links visible at 768 and 1440. Catalogue dropdown options: exact order match. Mobile menu open flow works via data-testid navbar-menu-toggle -> data-testid mobile-menu.

nav_behaviour.mobile: 0 desktop links, hamburger visible; mobile-menu opens with 5 links
